title: Instagram AI Order Concierge
shortDescription: A conversational workflow that answers product questions, collects order details, records structured data, and notifies the business team.
overview: The workflow was designed around a real ecommerce message journey rather than a generic chatbot.
It handles product context, selection steps, customer information, order confirmation, data logging, and internal notification.
problem: Manual Instagram order handling required repeated questions, created inconsistent records, and increased the chance of missing customer details.
solution: I mapped the order conversation into stages and connected the message flow with structured data capture and operational notifications.
